reason: Verify layer boundaries, framework placement, and raw dependency import isolation.
Verify app DB migrations, transaction behavior, and shared DB exclusion.
Verify durable event semantics remain compatible with DDD event facade.
Verify internal API response shape and route DTO mapping.
Verify authenticated route handler flow and no direct model/db calls.
Verify Svelte scheduler/message UI, API client, tests, and production build.
Review cross-layer data flow from UI through DB and worker lifecycle.
Verify implementation matches goqite API and operational constraints.
